description_long: A white ceramic plate with a subtle leaf pattern around the rim holds two pieces of bread topped with mashed avocado and a halved avocado with the pit still inside. The plate is slightly irregular in shape, giving it a handmade or artisanal appearance. A metal butter knife rests on the edge of the plate, its handle extending outward. The avocado halves display a rich green flesh and a dark, textured skin, while the bread slices are thick and rustic. The mashed avocado on the bread is spread unevenly, with visible ridges and texture. The overall presentation suggests a fresh, casual meal, likely intended for breakfast or a light snack.
description: A white ceramic plate with a leaf pattern holds avocado toast, a halved avocado, and a metal butter knife, creating a fresh and artisanal presentation.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from the side, showing the butter knife resting on the edge and the avocado toast and halved avocado arranged on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the plate with the avocado half most prominent and the bread slices partially obscured.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from above, clearly displaying both pieces of avocado toast and the halved avocado, with the knife partially visible.
description_view_3: The front view shows the butter knife handle in the foreground, the halved avocado with pit, and both pieces of avocado toast clearly visible.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: decorative leaf pattern visible around the rim of the plate
